meaning: consumer goods; means of livelihood; means of subsistence; documents r
sentence: 超市里的生活资料很齐全，买东西很方便。
pinyin: Chāo shì lǐ de shēng huó zī liào hěn qí quán, mǎi dōng xī hěn fāng biàn.
english: The supermarket has a full range of daily necessities, so shopping there is very convenient.

meaning: to come up with an idea; generation of ideas; inspiration
sentence: 这个活动的发想来自一次偶然的聊天。
pinyin: Zhè gè huó dòng de fā xiǎng lái zì yī cì ǒu rán de liáo tiān.
english: The inspiration for this event came from a chance conversation.

sentence: 两点之间若处于等位，电流就不会流动。
pinyin: Liǎng diǎn zhī jiān ruò chǔ yú děng wèi, diàn liú jiù bú huì liú dòng.
english: If two points are at equipotential, no current will flow between them.

sentence: 每件快递都有一个独特的编号。
pinyin: Měi jiàn kuài dì dōu yǒu yī gè dú tè de biān hào.
english: Every parcel has a unique tracking number.

meaning: to say nothing of; not to mention; let alone
sentence: 别说跑步了，他连走路都费力。
pinyin: Bié shuō pǎo bù le, tā lián zǒu lù dōu fèi lì.
english: Not to mention running — he even struggles to walk.
